# CWE-294 — Authentication Bypass by Capture-replay (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-294-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: accepts the same signed login blob repeatedly without nonce tracking.
func TokenLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	token := r.FormValue("auth_token")
	if token == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing token", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"ok":true}`))
}
